config.comment.fixbeaconrangefreecam: Fix beacon range rendering to use player position when in freecam.
config.comment.durabilitywarningenabled: Warn in chat when a damageable item reaches 1% durability.
config.comment.autorestockhotbar: When opening a container, restock listed items back into the hotbar.
config.comment.totemrestock: When a Totem of Undying is used, restock another one into the same hand from the inventory.
config.comment.hotbarrestocklist: Item IDs used by the auto restock hotbar feature.
config.comment.openconfig: Hotkey to open the HikariTweaks config screen.
